label: Transparent Arctic char motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Char transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an Arctic char flank motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete fish subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single Arctic char in lateral flank view with accurate fish anatomy, streamlined body, complete head, dorsal fin, pectoral fins, pelvic fins, anal fin, and tail. Show an arctic char flank: bright silver body, subtle ice-blue reflections along the back and belly, vivid pink-to-orange side blush, small pale spots, crisp scale rows, cool polar-river sheen. It must read as Arctic char, not salmon, trout, koi, tuna, or food.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; no cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves silver, pink, orange, and ice-blue color. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no river scene, no ice chunks, no hook, no lure, no plate, no school of fish, no props, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Char light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Char", derived from the visible Arctic char motif cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme for a cool tracking system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840x2160 target composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Char, Arctic Char, Polar River, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from the Arctic char flank: bright silver scales, pink-orange side blush, orange fins, ice-blue belly reflections, polar river blues, graphite dorsal shadows, pale spots, and streamlined tracking motion. The board must visibly respect those colors and must read as Arctic char, not salmon, generic trout, koi, or seafood.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible with tracking-system metrics.
Full component coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, slider, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, popover, tooltip, progress, avatar, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, breadcrumbs, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, timeline, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, texture samples, simple icons.
Charts/data: include a cold-route tracking dashboard with line chart, bar chart, donut chart, compact KPIs, status chips, and a table of route events.
Style: cool polar-river tracking system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, silver-scale surfaces, pink-orange primary action states, ice-blue accents, deep graphite text, pale spot texture, streamlined navigation lanes, crisp shadcn/tweakcn product UI.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no beige-only palette, no stock UI kit, no restaurant or food imagery, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Char", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Char dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Char". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible Arctic char motif cutout.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840x2160 target composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Char, Arctic Char, Polar River, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Reference use: Preserve the same Arctic char tracking-system language as the light board: deep polar-river panels, silver-scale foregrounds, pink-orange primary states, ice-blue controls, orange fin warnings, graphite borders, pale spot texture, streamlined route lanes, and precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible on dark polar-river surfaces.
Full component coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, slider, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, popover, tooltip, progress, avatar, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, breadcrumbs, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, timeline, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, texture samples, simple icons.
Charts/data: include a cool route tracking dashboard with line chart, bar chart, donut chart, compact KPIs, status chips, and a table of route events.
Visual details: dark graphite-blue current background, luminous silver text, coral-pink active actions, orange fin alerts, ice-blue route highlights, pale spotted scale overlays, crisp 8px cards, restrained contrast.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no restaurant or food imagery, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Char", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
